nasb.text: The incense which you shall make, you shall not make in the same proportions for yourselves; it shall be holy to you for the Lord.

esv.text: And the incense that you shall make according to its composition, you shall not make for yourselves. It shall be for you holy to the Lord.

cnv.text: 你所制的香，你們不可按著它的分量為自己配製；你要以這香為聖歸給耶和華。

ccb.text: 你们不可用同样的配方为自己做香，要视它为耶和华的圣物。
